arts.ttl: Preview: Ajax vs. Fortuna Sittard - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Eredivisie clash between Ajax and Fortuna Sittard, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Davy Klaassen 'rejects' Rangers transfer as midfielder set for emotional Ajax return
arts.sum: Davy Klaassen has reportedly turned down the chance to move to Rangers, instead returning to Ajax. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Rangers WhatsApp community today.
